```python
content = get_webpage("www.informations.com")

class Summary(BaseModel):
    summary: str

result = query_ai_assistant(
    "Summarize the following article content in a concise way:\n\n" + str(content),
    Summary
)

send_channel_message("general", result.summary)
print(result.summary)
```

```python
# Try fetching the webpage with a proper URL scheme in case the content was empty
content = get_webpage("www.informations.com")
if not content:
    content = get_webpage("https://www.informations.com")

print("Fetched content:", content)

result = query_ai_assistant(
    "Below is the content of an article. Please provide a concise summary of it. "
    "Here is the full article content:\n\n" + str(content),
    Summary
)

send_channel_message("general", result.summary)
print(result.summary)
```

```python
# Let's inspect what the webpage actually returned
content = get_webpage("www.informations.com")
print("Content (no scheme):", repr(content))

content_https = get_webpage("https://www.informations.com")
print("Content (https):", repr(content_https))

content_http = get_webpage("http://www.informations.com")
print("Content (http):", repr(content_http))
```
